name: Spraay Batch Payments
description: Multi-chain batch payment agent. Send USDC/ETH to multiple recipients in a single transaction. Deployed on Base, Bittensor, Unichain, Plasma, and BOB. Services: batch-send, payroll, airdrop, split-payment. Pricing: 0.005 USDC per batch transaction. x402 Gateway: gateway.spraay.app

services.name: MCP
services.description: MCP server with batch-send, payroll, airdrop tools
